subcodes.first_line: This is a Book unto her who hath believed in her Lord and attained unto His days and was numbered among the devoutly submissive ones. O handmaid of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب للتی آمنت بربها و فازت بایامه و کانت من القانتات ان یا امه الله ان
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
